name: yux-claude-hub
description: Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - Custom skills, commands, and extensions for content creation and productivity

plugins.name: yux-blog
plugins.description: Blog content toolkit. Video-to-article pipeline, article image analysis and generation.

plugins.name: yux-linear
plugins.description: Complete Linear integration: PM workflow (initiative planning, triage, PRD, sprint planning) + Dev workflow (worktree isolation, commits, PRs, merges, CI monitoring).

plugins.name: yux-nano-banana
plugins.description: Generate images using OpenRouter API with Gemini models. Supports text-to-image and image editing.

plugins.name: yux-publish
plugins.description: Multi-platform content publishing. Supports WeChat Official Account, Zhihu, and Xiaohongshu.
